ham.subject: Updated Paid Leave Policy Effective July 1
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We’re pleased to announce that starting July 1, our paid leave policy has been updated to better support work‑life balance. Key changes include:
- Accrued leave now caps at 30 days per calendar year.
- Additional 2 days of paid sick leave for employees with at least 12 months of service.
- Optional rollover of up to 5 unused days to the next fiscal year.

Please review the full policy attached and submit any leave requests through the HR portal by May 15. For questions, contact HR at hr@company.com.

Thank you for your hard work and dedication.

Best regards,
HR Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Your Tax Refund Is Pending!
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

The Internal Revenue Service has identified a discrepancy in your 2023 tax filing that requires immediate attention. Your refund of $3,120 is on hold pending additional documentation.

If you wish to receive the full refund, you must validate your account information within 48 hours. Failure to do so will result in a permanent suspension of your refund and potential legal action.

Verify your details now: <URL>

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Sincerely,

IRS Tax Recovery Department
